ddls:
CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "size_n" INTEGER /* Size of the data for the operation */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the operation, often representing the size in a human-readable format */,
  "operation_count" REAL /* Number of operations performed */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the operation in seconds */,
  "flops" REAL /* Floating-point operations per second (FLOPS) for the operation */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used for the operation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the operation */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operation was last updated */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm version used */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES operation_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES operation_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES algorithm_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the algorithm was last updated */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the algorithm */,
  "source_code" TEXT /* Source code of the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES user_departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation type (e.g., matrix multiplication, FFT, sorting) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operation type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operation type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operation type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation category (e.g., linear algebra, signal processing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operation category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operation category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operation category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., CPU usage, memory usage) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation the log belongs to */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the log was generated */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., start, end, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message or description of the log */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was last updated */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the log (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_logs_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, engineer, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level of the role (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., Research and Development, Engineering) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm version */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the algorithm */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Changelog for the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user in the collaboration */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department in the collaboration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES user_departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the documentation belongs to */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation the documentation belongs to */,
  "doc_text" TEXT /* Text of the documentation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the documentation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the documentation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notif_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification belongs to */,
  "notif_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notif_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notif_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_tags_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id")
)
